title: Android 13
description:
This mandatory Android 13 update may, for certain aged batteries, enable important battery management features that reduce the device’s battery capacity and charging performance.

Battery replacement is recommended for aged batteries. To learn more about smartphone batteries and understand battery replacement options, g.co/pixel/4abattery.

Your device will restart automatically when certain criteria are met.

Downloading updates over a mobile network or while roaming may cause additional charges.
